'''Newport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that went out of business sometime before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. By [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], it had apparently been restored to service. It was largely damaged when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] took Coruscant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
